title: quercus calliprinos var. fenzlii
intro: Quercus calliprinos var. fenzlii, also known as the Cyprus oak or Fenzli's oak, is a rare and endemic variety of Quercus calliprinos native to Cyprus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Quercus calliprinos var. fenzlii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of herbal tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
